spec_match.rationale: Perfect spec match using real history.pushState and DOM updates to trigger native soft navigation heuristics, monitored via a real PerformanceObserver.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive SPA mock that triggers real/simulated events with an active log panel.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect alignment with the observer logger description.

edge_cases.rationale: Robust feature detection showing browser support status and falling back gracefully to simulated logs in older browsers.

references.rationale: Violates repository hard rule: does not contain a link to chromestatus.com/feature/5144837209194496.

design_system.rationale: Aesthetics align with design system colors and typography.

openQuestions.title: Add ChromeStatus link (hard rule violation)
openQuestions.detail: The page does not contain a link to chromestatus.com/feature/5144837209194496, which violates the repository hard rule that every concept page must include a ChromeStatus link.
